description: Use this API to return an array of character values indicating the data types corresponding to a set of specified STRING values that are valid input values to any of the data retrieval routines of the substation data family (aStationInt, aStationReal and aStationChar). This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, types = astationtypes(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: types
return_values.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying each of which contains one of the fol-lowing characters indicating the data type of the data associated with the cor- responding element of STRING. (output).

error_codes.description: Position of the first element in STRING that contains a value that is not a valid STRING value for any of the data retrieval routines in the substation data family (1 < n < NSTR).
